_meta.description: DecisionResult for persona MUM-F-34-2C evaluated against scenario nutrimix_2_6

_score_commentary.need_score: High health anxiety (0.76) × high immunity concern (0.85) × high child health proactivity (0.79), amplified by nutrition gap awareness (0.71). Child in target age band (2-6) so age relevance factor = 1.0.
_score_commentary.awareness_score: Awareness budget 0.5 × channel match for Instagram-primary persona = 0.44 ad receptivity × 1.0 platform match. Pediatrician endorsement boost (+0.15) applied because medical_authority_trust (0.77) > 0.60 threshold. Influencer campaign boost (+0.10) applied because influencer_trust (0.39) < 0.50 threshold — NOT applied. Final: 0.578.
_score_commentary.consideration_score: Trust factor (0.77 + 0.59)/2 = 0.68. Research factor = 0.87 × 0.78 = 0.679. Cultural fit = 1.0 (non-vegetarian, no lactose restriction). Brand factor = indie_brand_openness (0.69). Risk dampener = 0.4 × (1 - 0.38) = 0.248, risk_factor = 0.752. Weighted sum = 0.30×0.68 + 0.20×0.679 + 0.15×1.0 + 0.20×0.69 + 0.15×0.752 = 0.512.
